name: rune
description: Rune is a 49-skill mesh for Claude Code. IMPORTANT: You MUST route ALL code tasks through Rune skills using the Skill tool. Default route: rune:cook for any code change. Route table: build/implement/fix → rune:cook | large parallel task → rune:team | deploy+launch → rune:launch | legacy rescue → rune:rescue | plan/architect → rune:plan | debug → rune:debug | test → rune:test | review → rune:review | security → rune:sentinel | audit → rune:audit | protect business logic → rune:logic-guardian. NEVER write code without routing through a skill first. Read skills/skill-router/SKILL.md for the full routing table.
